title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master modern UI/UX principles, wireframing, prototyping, and user-centered design workflows.

title: Data Science & Machine Learning
description: Explore data analysis, machine learning algorithms, and AI model development using Python.

title: Digital Marketing Essentials
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, and branding strategies for business growth.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Understand ethical hacking, network security, risk management, and cybersecurity best practices.

title: Mobile App Development with Flutter
description: Build beautiful cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Dart for Android and iOS.
